name: Horng Tong Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Horng Tong Enterprise Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of electronic connectors in Taiwan. The company offers connectors for mother boards, notebooks, and networks/antennas/RJs; AMOLED materials, sublimation machines, and cameras; and car electronics, including DVRs and AVMs, car chargers, wireless chargers, AVN and ADAS products, dash cam-mirrors, head-up displays, portable car chargers, ATL system products, and 8 in 1 control boxes. It also provides Internet of Things products, such as police devices and equipment, modems, wireless modules, emergency phones, smart crutches, and LTE Mifi products; and communication products. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
